pi_items.source: task_json description, export_result.sh, and verifier.py logic explicitly specify and enforce this output path
Web search confirms Pioneer 3-AT base weight is ~12-12.5 kg. verifier.py expects the maximum mass in the output file to be between 10.0 and 15.0 kg, perfectly aligning with 12.5 kg.
task.json instructions and pioneer_field.wbt header explicitly request 0.7. verifier.py enforces a range of [0.5, 0.9]
task.json instructions and pioneer_field.wbt explicitly require setting the softness to 0.001 in ContactProperties
Inspected pioneer_field.wbt directly, which shows 'mass 1.0' under the PIONEER_ROBOT physics node
Inspected pioneer_field.wbt directly, which contains the node 'DEF PIONEER_ROBOT Robot {'
Matches the role explicitly specified in task.json description
Matches the context of agricultural terrain navigation explicitly specified in task.json description

privileged_info_summary: Verified that the task operates on a synthetically modified Webots world file ('pioneer_field.wbt') containing a Pioneer 3-AT robot ('PIONEER_ROBOT') with an intentionally incorrect initial mass of 1.0 kg. The expected target mass of 12.5 kg is aligned with the real-world specifications of the Pioneer 3-AT platform and enforced by the verifier within a [10.0, 15.0] range. The required output path ('/home/ga/Desktop/pioneer_terrain.wbt') and expected friction coefficient (coulombFriction=0.7) are also strictly enforced by the task scripts and verifier logic.
